Since I've already put in 1.5h and am at 87% progress, submitting this partial chunk frames me as someone who just finally finished the hard part rather than abandoning the task. My energy is low enough that I need this immediate win to feel safe.

goals.description: Collapse onto the couch immediately after submission to recover from sleep debt without engaging with the reading.
goals.rationale: Once the assignment is submitted and the immediate social threat is neutralized, I can address the physical crushing feeling of my sleep debt. The reading has a soft deadline tomorrow, so I don't have to tackle it yet. Rushing through it now would drain more energy than necessary, and since I value leisure and avoiding effort over perfect completion, skipping it for tonight is a rational short-term trade-off.
